title: Lingo
description: Full-stack social platform with authentication, friends system, real-time chat/video, and a responsive themed UI.
bullets: Node.js and Express single-domain deployment with integrated UI + API, production scripts, and clean routing.
JWT-based auth flows with MongoDB persistence and secure middleware protection.
Friends system with API-based friend requests, real-time chat, and video calling via Stream SDK.
Reliable, themeable frontend powered by React, TanStack Query,Axios, and Tailwind/DaisyUI.

title: Wallet App React Native + Expo
description: A cross-platform (iOS/Android) expense tracker built with React Native and Expo. Real-time balance updates, and an Express + Postgres backend.
bullets: Secure Auth with Clerk signup/login with 6-digit email verification, plus a smooth logout flow for quick account switching.
Add income/expenses, live balance updates, delete transactions, and a custom-built pull-to-refresh for Recent Transactions.
Scalable backend with Express REST API on a Neon Postgres data base, cloud-deployed for mobile access, protected by Redis-based rate limiting.

title: MusicRewards App React Native + Expo
description: A cross-platform (iOS/Android) music rewards app built with React Native (Expo Bare Workflow). Users earn points by listening to full tracks with confetti celebration.
bullets: Background audio with React Native Track Player (RNTP) and reward system for completing songs.
Persistent state via Zustand + AsyncStorage for user, music, and theme preferences.
Light/Dark mode, confetti modal, and developer tools to clear or log persisted data
